caseName: United States v. E. I. Du Pont De Nemours & Co.
caseNameFull: UNITED STATES v. E. I. Du PONT De NEMOURS & CO.
attorneys: Charles H. Weston argued the cause for the United States. With him on the brief were Solicitor General SobelojJ, Assistant Attorney General Barnes, Ralph S. Spritzer and William J. Lamont., Gerhard A. Gesell argued the cause for appellee. With him on the brief were James H. McGlothlin, Burke Marshall, Hugh M. Morris and Frank J. Zugehoer.
judges: Reed, Warren, Clark, Harlan, Frankfurter, Black, Douglas
